folio.label: 106v
folio.l: Were it for holynesse , or for dotage
I can nat sey , but swicú a grete corage
Had this knygút , to ben a wedded man
That day and nygút , he dotú al that he can
To spye , where he mygút , wedded be
Preyingö oure lord , to graunte hi~ that he
Mygút ones knowe , of thilk blisful lyf
That is bytwix , an husbonde and his wyf´
And for to lyue , vnder that holy bond
Witú whicú , that first , god , man and wo~man bond
Noon other lyf seide he , is wortú a bene
For wedlak is so esy , and so clene
That in this world , it is a Paradyse
Thus seide this olde knygút , that was so wyse
And certeynly as sotú , as god is kyngö

note.notetxt: is there any correction of certainly?

folio.l: To take a wyf , it is a glorious thyngö
And namely whan a man , is old and hore
Than is a wyf , the fruyt of his tresore
Than shuld he take , a ©ongö wyf and a feyre
On whicú he mygút , engender hi~ an Eyre
And lede his lyf , in Ioye and solace
Where alle theise bacheleres , syngen allas
Whan that they fynd , any aduäsitee
In loue , whicú is but childissú vanyte
And trewely it syt wel , to be so
That bacheleres , han oft tymetyme peyne and woo
On brotel ground , they bilde , and brothilnessebrotilnessebrothilnesse
They fynde , whan they wene sekernesse
They lyue but as a brid , or as a beest
In liberte , and vnder noon a reest
There as a wedded man , in his estate
Lyuetú a lyf blisseful , and ordinate
Vnder this ©ok , of mariage I bounde
Wel may his hert , in Ioye and blisse habounde
For who can be , so buxum as a wyf
Who is so trewe , and eke so ententyf
To kepe hi~ syke and hole , as is his make
For wel or woo , she wyl hi~ nat forsake
She nys nat wery , hi~ to loue and serue
Thougú that he lye , bedrede , til he sterue
And ©et so~me Clerkes seyn , it is nat so
Of whicú , Theofaste , is onõononõ of thoo check the correction here/ODR/
What force , thougú Theofaste list lye
Ne take æè no wyf q¶ he , for husbondrye
As for to spare , in houshold thyn dispence
A trewe seruau~t , dotú more diligence
Thy good to kepe , than thyn owen wyf

note.notetxt: 55last three lines are a bit squeezed.ODR
